allow: Bash(awk '/^\\s*\\.\(hero|trust-bar|hours-strip|conditions-section|how-section|about-grid|about-content|logo-slider|pricing-section|schroepfen-section|kurs-banner|testimonials-section|faq-section|cta-section|cta-bg\)\\s*\\{/{name=$0; getline; while\($0 !~ /^\\s*\\}/\){if\($0 ~ /background/\){gsub\(/^[ \\t]+/,"",name\); gsub\(/^[ \\t]+/,"",$0\); print name " => " $0; break}; getline}}' index.html)
